name: solfunmeme-oracle-oci
command: import oci,os,mimetypes;c=oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(oci.config.from_file('~/.solfunmeme-keys/oci_config'));ns=c.get_namespace().data;[c.put_object(ns,'solfunmeme-dioxus',os.path.relpath(os.path.join(r,f),'docs'),open(os.path.join(r,f),'rb'),content_type='application/wasm' if f.endswith('.wasm') else mimetypes.guess_type(os.path.join(r,f))[0] or 'application/octet-stream') for r,_,fs in os.walk('docs') for f in fs]
